steps.title: Translate the endpoints
steps.content: A minimum of $1{,}620$ miles means $d$ is at least $1{,}620$. A maximum of $4{,}240$ miles means $d$ is at most $4{,}240$.

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content: Place $d$ between the two endpoint values: $$1{,}620\le d\le 4{,}240$$ The answer is B.
